text:
Once upon a time, there was a clumsy girl named Polly. Every day, she tripped over nothing. She didned a giant feather boa; nonetheless, she didn't notice.

On Easter night, she went to bed dressed as an egg. Of course, she fell right out!

She dreamed she was an eagle. She soared high into the sky, snatching small fish. When an owl woke her with a big owl pellet pellet pellet mouthful, Polly crashed back down.

She dreamed she was an ostrich. That didn't fly anymore.

She dreamed she was an eagle again. Owls weren't her thing.

She woke up satisfied. Perhaps an ostrich feather?

No luck. Maybe an eagle owl.



Maybe.

*She flew towards her own mirror. She saw an eye. Yes!

Oh, owl.

That night... an owl.

*A big one.

*She flew it right backwards into an egg.

Happy Easter!

She felt weird.

What's I tasted?


She
